coastal.title: Woman rescued after vessel sank off B.C. coast died in hospital
coastal.description: Six people remain missing and are presumed drowned after the KingFisher, operated by Top Vancouver Fishing Charter Inc., went down suddenly near Roberts Bank.

kamloops.title: Kamloops skies turn orange as wildfire smoke drifts into region
kamloops.description: An air quality alert remains in effect for the region due to drifting smoke from two wildfires in the Boston Bar area. The smoke is making it hard to breathe.

all.title: Gibsons mayor says broken BC Ferries ramp has caused chaos for many
all.description: Many people told Global News they have been left scrambling to book a sailing, despite some vessels leaving with empty space on board.
